title: Accurate Modeling of the Self-Heating and Trapping Effects in GaN HEMTs
author: Li, Yiao

steps.instruction: Outline • Introduction of GaN HEMTs modeling and new features in ASM-HEMT 101.4 and MVSG_CMC 3.2.0 • RF parameter extraction package in IC-CAP • Parameter extraction flow • Thermal extraction • Trapping extraction • Summary
